auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in with email and password or with Google.
auth.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact your team admin.

legal.privacyIntro: Expiry Alert helps teams track reagent expiry dates and optionally create alerts in Google Calendar.
legal.privacyDataCollectedBody: When you sign in with Google, we store your basic profile (name, email, avatar). We also store data you add in the app, such as reagent names, expiry dates, notes, and team workspace records.
legal.privacyCalendarBody: Calendar access is used only when you explicitly connect Google Calendar and create alerts. The app creates events in your calendar based on your selected active reagents and chosen alert date/time.
legal.privacyStorageBody: Your application data is stored on our managed server infrastructure for app functionality, syncing, and backup operations.
legal.privacySharingBody: We do not sell your personal data. Data is shared only with service providers required to run core app features (for example, Google APIs when you use Google sign-in or Google Calendar features).
legal.privacyUserControlsBody: You can disconnect Google Calendar at any time from Settings. You can request account or data removal by contacting support.
legal.termsIntro: By using Expiry Alert, you agree to these terms.
legal.termsUseBody: Use the app for lawful team operations and inventory tracking. Do not misuse the service, interfere with systems, or attempt unauthorized access.
legal.termsAccountsBody: You are responsible for activity in your account and for keeping your Google account secure. You are responsible for checking and confirming reagent data before operational use.
legal.termsAvailabilityBody: We may update, improve, or change parts of the service over time. Temporary downtime may occur during maintenance or infrastructure incidents.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: The service is provided on an as-is basis. We are not liable for indirect losses resulting from service interruptions, third-party outages, or inaccurate user-entered data.

dialog.duplicateExpiryHint: Enter a new expiry date for the duplicated reagent

notifications.title: Expiring Soon!
notifications.guidance: Check and replace expired items. Contact supplier for reorders.

settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.pushDescription: Receive notifications about expiring reagents on this device.
settings.iosDescription: Push notifications require iOS 16.4+ and the app must be added to your Home Screen first. Tap Share > Add to Home Screen.
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences
settings.iconRefreshNote: If the Home Screen icon still looks old on iPhone, remove the app from the Home Screen and add it again once.
settings.teamWorkspaceDescription: Choose the workspace this browser is currently working on.
settings.teamAutoAssignHelp: New users can create a team instantly, join with a password, or request access to an existing team.
settings.inviteHelp: If the email already has an account, they are added immediately. Otherwise, they join after first sign-in.
settings.inviteHelpReadOnly: Only team owners or admins can invite members.
settings.teamCreated: Team created and ready to use
settings.teamPasswordHelpAdmin: Set one password that members can use to join this team.
settings.teamPasswordHelpMember: Only owners/admins can set team password.
settings.requestJoinMessagePlaceholder: Optional message for the team admins
settings.requestJoinHelp: Team owners and admins will be notified and can approve or reject your request.
settings.forgotTeamPasswordHelp: A reset link will be emailed to the team owner/admin email.
settings.teamPasswordResetRequestFailed: Failed to send password reset email
settings.calendarDescription: Download an ICS file with all reagent expiry dates to add to your calendar app.
settings.googleCalendarDescription: Select active (non-archived) reagents and create alert event(s) directly in your Google Calendar.
settings.modeSingle: One shared event for all selected reagents
settings.selectAlertDateTime: Please choose an alert date and time

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Send private updates, team notices, and review incoming messages.
messages.composeDescription: Use the current team context to send a private or team message. System broadcast is available only to the system admin.
messages.systemDescription: This message will be visible to all active users in the system.
messages.systemAdminEnabled: System broadcast is enabled for this account.
messages.noRecipients: No active team members are available for private messages.
messages.attachDescription: Attach one or more reagents as context for this message.
messages.noReagents: No reagents available in the current team.
messages.loadResourcesFailed: Failed to load team members or reagents
messages.markReadFailed: Failed to mark message as read
messages.liveAvailable: Live reagent record is currently available.
messages.liveArchived: The live reagent record is available and archived.
messages.liveMissing: The live reagent record is no longer available.
messages.snapshotOnly: Snapshot only in the current team context.

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this reagent?
confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} reagents?
confirm.deleteMultipleMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} reagents? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.archive: Are you sure you want to archive this reagent?
confirm.archiveMultiple: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} reagents?

success.reagentRestored: Reagent updated and restored to active

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
errors.addFailed: Failed to add reagent. Please try again.
errors.updateFailed: Failed to update reagent. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete reagent. Please try again.
errors.archiveFailed: Failed to archive reagent. Please try again.
errors.restoreFailed: Failed to restore reagent. Please try again.
errors.addNoteFailed: Failed to add note. Please try again.
errors.deleteNoteFailed: Failed to delete note. Please try again.
errors.snoozeFailed: Failed to snooze notification. Please try again.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

install.title: Install ExpiryAlert
install.description: Add to your home screen for push notifications and quick access.
install.iosInstructions: Tap the Share button, then 'Add to Home Screen' to get push notifications.
install.androidInstructions: Tap the menu (⋮) then 'Install app' or 'Add to Home Screen' for push notifications.

teamSelect.title: Choose Team
teamSelect.subtitle: You signed in successfully. Choose or create a team to continue.
teamSelect.joinDescription: Use your team's shared password for immediate access.
teamSelect.requestDescription: If you do not have the shared password, send a request to the team admins.
teamSelect.requestMessagePlaceholder: Add context so the team admins know who you are
teamSelect.createDescription: Create a new team and start using it immediately.
teamSelect.pendingMessage: Your request to join {{team}} is waiting for team admin approval.
teamSelect.pendingTeamMessage: Your account is waiting for final access setup. We will refresh this page automatically.

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.joinRequestsDescription: Approve or reject users who requested access to this team.

push.iosGuidance: Install app to home screen first
push.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported on this device or in this browser mode.
push.deniedHelp: Tap the lock icon next to the address bar → Permissions → Notifications → Allow. Then refresh the page.
push.testFailed: Failed to send a test notification
